root_cause_summary: The accepted event used an event_type that did not match the configured billable metric.
root_cause_details: Event Search showed event_type compute_v2, while the billable metric expected compute.
resolution_summary: Changed the event_type to compute and verified the corrected event matched the metric.
resolution_steps: Opened Event Search for transaction tx-event-type.
Compared event_type with the billable metric configuration.
Changed the submitted event_type to compute.
verification_steps: Use Event Search to confirm event_type is compute.
Verify the billable metric matches the corrected event.
Verify invoice usage reflects the accepted event.
verification_results: Event Search showed the corrected event_type.
The billable metric matched the corrected event.
Invoice usage reflected the corrected event.
